item.name: Sirensong Mussel
item.description:
A razor-sharp mollusk found in the Sirensong Sea. Those averse to paper cuts are advised not to touch the edges of its shell without proper protection.

[Suitable for printing on small canvases.]

fish.guide: In making its abode on the seabeds and reefs of the Sirensong Sea, this mussel quietly wreaks carnage upon other marine life by creating nigh-unnavigable mazes of razor-sharp shells.
